questions.question: Is there a collision or physical contact between any two vehicles, or between a vehicle and a pedestrian or cyclist?
Is any vehicle in dangerous proximity to another vehicle, cyclist, or pedestrian (near-miss)?
What type of collision or contact occurred?
options: A. Vehicle-to-vehicle collision in the intersection
B. Sideswipe during turning or lane change

questions.question: What are the current weather conditions in the scene?
What time of day best describes the lighting conditions?
Does any vehicle appear to run a red light or enter the intersection against the signal?
Does any vehicle make an illegal turn (wrong lane, U-turn where prohibited, cutting across lanes)?
Does a pedestrian cross outside a marked crosswalk or against the signal?
How busy is the intersection with traffic?
Are motorcycles or scooters visible in the intersection?
Does any vehicle brake suddenly or perform emergency stopping in the intersection?
